title: Product Handbook
text: The product handbook explains how teams can connect documents, ask questions, and receive grounded answers with citations. Each answer should be based on retrieved source material when the user asks about private or project-specific information.

title: Support Policy
text: The support policy defines three priority levels. Priority one is reserved for production outages. Priority two covers degraded workflows. Priority three covers general questions, documentation requests, and minor usability issues.

title: Security Overview
text: The security overview recommends least-privilege access, encrypted storage, and regular review of uploaded documents. Administrators should rotate secrets and avoid committing credentials to the repository.
